placeholderImages.description: 3D minimal SaaS landing page hero illustration, wide 16:9. Right side: large rounded white document with floating badges (ATS Friendly, AI Analysis, PDF Export). Soft dark navy-to-teal gradient background. No people, no faces, no clutter, clean minimal design.
Clean mobile app mockup on a simple neutral background. Focus on professional UI and clear document layout. No people, minimalist composition.
